description: State receipt issued by fiscal officials of the Qalyūbiyya qism, one of the twenty-four administrative sections that existed in Egypt after 1826. Dated in [1]247 according to l. 1, and probably in the month of D[hū l-]Ḥijja based on the penultimate line of the document. The second line names a certain Muḥammad Rāʾīf Effendī. For another receipt issued by the same administrative qism, see: JRL Gaster ar. 112 (PGPID 32892). MCD.
